% ── SUMMARY ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Summary}

Data Platform Engineer with 2+ years at ADP --- architected end-to-end risk detection pipeline processing 10K+ payroll audit cases/month across 1M+ employee records, achieving 80\% classification precision and 40\% reduction in manual audit effort via Python ETL, AWS data services (Glue, Lambda, RDS, DynamoDB), and automated data quality frameworks; open to Engineer/Specialist in Humanities visa or Highly Skilled Professional (HSP) visa sponsorship.
      Independently shipped two production data-driven products --- Job Tailor (jobtailor.in) and Keen --- end-to-end; expert in real-time pipelines, schema design, data contracts, and orchestration.

% ── EXPERIENCE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Experience}

\entry{Data Platform Engineer}{ADP}{Sep 2023 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected end-to-end risk detection data pipeline: Python ETL ingesting 1M+ employee payroll records → classification scoring (OpenAI/AWS Bedrock) → audit trail generation → React dashboards serving Finance, Compliance, and HR teams --- processing 10K+ cases/month as the single largest production pipeline by transaction volume.
  \item Engineered automated data quality framework reducing false positives by 25\% and achieving 80\% classification precision; implemented anomaly detection rules that caught pre-production data issues, eliminating unnecessary downstream escalations.
  \item Built RAG data pipeline ingesting IRS tax codes and state labor laws alongside structured payroll data; partnered with compliance to define validation rules and automated classification, generating audit trails for every flagged record.
  \item Deployed and optimized AWS data infrastructure (Lambda, Step Functions, Glue, DynamoDB, RDS); cut infrastructure costs 40\% and eliminated 15+ hours of manual testing weekly while maintaining 99.9\%+ availability.
  \item Architected Node.js/Express data serving layer handling 10,000+ daily API calls at \textless{}200 ms latency via connection pooling, caching strategies, and query optimization.
  \item Integrated AWS Bedrock and OpenAI into production data workflows; improved operational efficiency 30\% and reduced resolution time 25\% by automating classification tasks previously requiring manual review.
  \item Designed React and Angular/TypeScript dashboards enabling analytics consumers to self-serve risk pattern insights; incorporated stakeholder feedback and improved Time-to-Interactive by 1.2 seconds.
\end{itemize}

% ── PROJECTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Projects}

\entry{Job Tailor --- ATS Data Pipeline \& Matching Engine}{\href{https://github.com/lohith261/CustomJobFinder}{github.com/lohith261/CustomJobFinder} \quad\textbullet\quad \href{https://jobtailor.in/}{jobtailor.in}}{2025 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Engineered real-time job aggregation pipeline scraping 5 platforms (Naukri, Indeed India, Internshala, Adzuna, RemoteOK); Groq AI scores each opportunity by keyword fit with ranked breakdown --- reducing 100s of listings to a personalised shortlist instantly.
  \item Built ATS keyword extraction pipeline (JD ingestion → LLM keyword extraction → token-level deduplication → coverage scoring) achieving 85\%+ keyword match on tailored resume outputs; packaged as a live production SaaS on Next.js 14, PostgreSQL/Supabase, Vercel.
  \item Architected end-to-end as sole engineer --- owned data schema, pipeline orchestration, API layer, and frontend; serving Indian job seekers across 5 integrated platforms.
\end{itemize}

\entry{Keen --- Real-Time Financial Data Pipeline}{\href{https://github.com/lohith261/keen}{github.com/lohith261/keen} \quad\textbullet\quad \href{https://keen-sigma.vercel.app/}{keen-sigma.vercel.app}}{2024}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Engineered real-time financial data pipeline: async Python scrapers fetching SEC EDGAR, Salesforce, NetSuite, HubSpot, and Crunchbase → schema validation \& anomaly detection → Claude AI ranking layer; streaming pipeline refreshes hourly serving PE firm research workflows.
  \item Implemented data contracts and automated quality checks (schema validation, anomaly detection) catching upstream data issues pre-ingestion; exports reports as PDF, Excel, or Google Sheets. Stack: Python 3.11 (Fly.io) + PostgreSQL + Supabase replication + React/TypeScript (Vercel).
\end{itemize}
